save_named_plan_with_furniture.details: Saved Layout A through the UI and verified localStorage entry includes image data, scale, imperial units, and the renamed sofa.

multiple_named_saves_coexist.details: After using Save as on active Layout A with name Layout B, library names were: ["Layout B"].

switching_handles_unsaved_changes.details: Clicking Open with a dirty active plan displayed the Unsaved changes dialog with Cancel, Discard, and Save & continue actions.

open_saved_plan_restores_full_state.details: Opened Layout B from a loaded plan and restored image/scale/units/furniture, but Open was disabled on the empty state while saved plans still existed.

storage_failures_surface_clear_error.details: Simulated QuotaExceededError surfaced alert text: "Storage is full. Remove older saved plans or use a smaller floor plan image.\n×".
